prompt_text: UserVoice vs Aha! pricing and features
response:
UserVoice is a **specialized customer feedback platform** with flat, end-user–based pricing starting around **$899/month**, while Aha! is a **broader product management suite** (roadmaps + ideas) with **per-user pricing starting around $59/user/month (annually)** for Roadmaps and about **$39–59/user/month (annually)** for Ideas.[2][3][5][7]

Below is a concise side‑by‑side on **pricing** and **core features**.

---

## 1. Pricing comparison

### UserVoice

- Typical publicly listed plans (feedback product):  
  - **Pro**: **$899/month** – includes up to 1,000 unique end users, web portal, in‑app widget, public status updates.[1]  
  - **Internal Capture**: **$1,199/month**.[1]  
  - **Premium**: **$1,349/month**.[1][2]  
  - **Enterprise**: custom.[1]  
- Older/alternative listing: pricing **“from $799/month”** for basic feedback tracking, **$899** with the in‑app widget, **$1,349** to connect customer data with ideas.[2]  
- G2 notes **entry‑level UserVoice “Growth”** priced from about **$10,788/year for 200 unique end users** (≈ $899/month).[4]

**Pricing model:**  
- Primarily **flat monthly fee tied to number of unique end users**, not per internal user seat.[1][4]  
- No setup fee reported on TrustRadius.[6]

### Aha!

Aha! has several products; for a UserVoice comparison the relevant ones are **Aha! Ideas** (feedback/idea portal) and **Aha! Roadmaps** (full product management suite).

**Aha! Roadmaps (main PM product)**[5][6]:  
- Tiers (monthly billing, per user):  
  - **Premium**: about **$74/user/month** (or **$59/user/month** on annual billing).[5]  
  - **Enterprise**: about **$124/user/month** (or **$99/user/month** annually).[5]  
  - **Enterprise+**: estimated **~$189/user/month** (or **$149/user/month** annually).[5]  
- TrustRadius shows similar tier names (Premium, Enterprise, Enterprise+).[6]

**Aha! Ideas (feedback/ideas module)**[7]:  
- Starts at **$39/seat/month (paid annually)**, but with a **minimum of 3 paid users**, so effective starting cost **$117/month**.[7]  
- To get features like custom domain & feedback submission, pricing moves to **$59/seat/month**, again minimum 3 seats → **$177/month (annual commitment)**.[7]  
- For larger teams (e.g., 10 seats), this can reach **$590/month** (annual).[7]

**Approximate cost to replace UserVoice with Aha!**  
- One estimate: to give 5 PMs the Aha! capabilities needed to replace UserVoice, **~$745/month** (Roadmaps + relevant add‑ons).[2]

**Pricing model:**  
- **Per internal user/seat**, with minimum seats and discounts for annual billing.[5][7]  
- Additional “Advanced” add‑ons (Ideas Advanced, Whiteboards Advanced, Knowledge Advanced) add per‑user monthly costs.[5]

---

## 2. Key feature comparison

### Purpose & scope

- **UserVoice**
  - Focus: **customer feedback management / customer intelligence**.[1][2][8]  
  - Designed to capture, aggregate, and prioritize product feedback from customers and internal teams.

- **Aha!**
  - Focus: **end‑to‑end product management** (strategy, roadmaps, features) with feedback as one module.[2][5]  
  - Aha! Ideas adds public idea portals and voting on top of a broader product management toolset.[2][5][7]

### Feedback collection & idea management

- **UserVoice**[1][2]:
  - Feedback collection tools (web portal + in‑app widget).[1][2]  
  - Idea boards / feature voting.  
  - Organize and prioritize feedback by impact or customer segment.  
  - Customer engagement: email notifications, status updates, closing the loop.[1]  

- **Aha! (Ideas + Roadmaps)**[2][5][7]:
  - Public **idea portals** and feature voting.  
  - Capture feedback directly in the Aha! app and route it into epics/features.  
  - Prioritization views (scorecards, value/effort frameworks).  
  - Multiple idea portals, custom fields, and
